summary: Completed comprehensive testing of keyboard shortcuts and textarea functionality. All features working perfectly with 100% success rate.
passed_tests: Textarea auto-expands on multi-line input (38px to 120px max)
Enter key sends message and clears input
Shortcut hints display correctly with proper data-testid attributes
Ctrl+N creates new session when project selected
Ctrl+E extracts insights from active session
End-to-end chat functionality works with AI responses
Send button enabled/disabled states work correctly
